task: Adversarial drafting gate audit for Chapter 16
summary: Chapter 16 PASSED drafting gate audit (iteration 1). Score: 9/10. Zero critical findings, zero major findings, eight minor findings (repetition patterns in 'that had lived in' x4, 'costume of love' x2, 'Not X. Y.' x9, 'the precise/exact' x11, 'the way' x10; scene balance concern with SCN-45 at 43% of chapter; MOT-005 Ythara absence; voice degradation pacing in final scene). Two warnings issued (collective repetition density, scene balance) — below 3-warning failure threshold. All 16 craft tools verified. All outline elements delivered. All automatic-fail checks cleared. Voice consistency excellent with Lirien identifiable in 2 sentences. Continuity flawless with zero violations. Emotional impact devastating — the Black Moment earns its function through restraint and craft discipline. Chapter proceeds to revision pipeline with minor remediation notes.
independenceNote: Audit conducted independently of prior pipeline results. All claims verified against actual draft text through automated scanning (banned phrases, clichés, tell-not-show, modern idioms, sentence structure repetition, paragraph opening distribution, adverb density, em-dash count, word frequency analysis) and manual close-reading of all 4,090 words. Upstream reports (voice, continuity, craft-enforcement) cross-referenced but not taken at face value — each finding independently verified. The craft-enforcement-report's 3 minor issues were independently confirmed as correctly classified. The voice-report's uncorrected VF-006 was independently flagged as MF-008.
